title: sampled_pulse.inspect request

clock.description: Action-specific clock input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

edge.description: Clock sampling edge. The schema default is authoritative; negedge often matches monitor semantics.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

payload.description: Action-specific payload input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

items.description: Action-specific payloads input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

payloads.description: Ordered payloads entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

payload_changed_without_sampled_valid.description: Action-specific payload_changed_without_sampled_valid input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

rules.description: Protocol or check-rule object. Nested fields define each rule default and applicability.

sample_point.description: Before/after observation point for posedge or dual sampling; it does not change the raw waveform range.

begin.description: Action-specific begin input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

end.description: Action-specific end input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_range.description: Closed analysis interval. begin and end may be omitted independently to use the available waveform bounds.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

valid.description: Action-specific valid input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description: Inspect valid pulses that were not observed at sampling edges.
x-purpose: 检查未被 clock 采到的 valid 短脉冲。
x-how_it_works: 按 clock 采样 valid，同时扫描 valid 原始变化；若 valid 在两个采样边沿间拉高但没有采样边沿看到高电平，则报 unsampled_valid_pulse。可选 payload/payloads 用于补风险现场。
x-when_to_use: 解释仿真里“波形有脉冲但 DUT 没采到”的问题。
x-description-zh: 检查未被 clock 采到的 valid 短脉冲。

use_when: 需要发现未被指定 clock sample 捕获的 valid 短脉冲。
do_not_use_when: 需要 raw glitch/stuck 扫描或 valid-ready 协议违规结论。

alternatives.when: 需要 raw pulse/glitch/stuck 异常。
需要 valid-ready 协议检查。
